text:
うむ、よろしい！
やはり君は優秀なアークスだな。
杞憂で済んでよかった。

オートワードを用いれば
かけ声のみならず、不意の状況でも
危険を知らせることが可能だ！

ユニークな使い方をするアークスも
居ることだし、使わなければ損と
言ってしまっても問題ないだろう！
いいか、私も当初は羞恥心

Now THAT'S what I like to see, kid! You're a
regular ol' ace of an ARKS! Gotta say, this
old man has a LOT less on his mind, now.

Using Auto Chat not only let's ya
give a shout, but can also give
ya a nudge when danger pops up.

Plenty of ARKS ops find plenty of creative ways
to use it. As far as I'm concerned, it'd be
a daggone waste not to.

When I was just starting out, I was too shy to
really use Auto Chat to its full potential and--
